title: Aureline work-item traceability-link vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the traceability_link_record frozen in docs/work_items/provider_object_and_traceability_contract.md. One record family pins a typed, stable link from a work item back to one engineering artifact (branch, worktree, review workspace, review pack, review evaluation result, review anchor, change object, patch stack, validation evidence, QA run, check-run snapshot, evidence packet, incident workspace packet, security incident packet, support bundle, object-handoff packet, offline-handoff packet, provider-consequence preview, publish-later queue item, browser-handoff packet, provider-callback envelope, status-transition packet, release artifact, audit-event stream, or another work item). Every link names a closed relation_type_class, a typed authority_marker_class that says whether the link is provider-authoritative, locally authoritative, cached read-only shadow, imported-handoff evidence only, pending provider validation, pending account-mapping resolution, or revoked, a typed link_origin_class that names where the link came from, a typed link_freshness_class that survives provider outages and offline work, a typed link_lifecycle_state_class so admin-reconciliation surfaces can distinguish proposed / active / superseded / revoked / archived links, and a directionality_class. The record never carries raw provider URLs, raw branch / commit URLs, raw review / pull-request URLs, raw author identity strings, raw absolute paths, or raw notification payloads; rows carry opaque ids, typed vocabulary, redaction-aware reviewable labels (<= 1024 graphemes), and freshness / authority / origin / lifecycle tokens only. Composes with (and does not replace) the work_item_detail_record schema (the source row a link binds to through source_work_item_detail_record_id_ref); the provider_object_record schema (the bound provider-object projection through linked_provider_object_record_id_ref); the provider-mode contract (provider_actor_class, redaction_class, drift_state_class, next_safe_action_class are re-exported from there); the publish-later contract (provider_object_relation_record / publish_later_queue_item_record / browser_handoff_packet_record / provider_callback_envelope_record); the review-workspace / review-pack / change-stack / patch-stack contracts; the support / incident contracts (object_handoff_packet_record / offline_handoff_packet_record / support_bundle_record_id_ref / incident_workspace_packet_record_id_ref); and the issue-routing matrix. The eventual work-items crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record_kind, relation_type_class, authority_marker_class, link_origin_class, link_freshness_class, link_lifecycle_state_class, target_artifact_class, directionality_class, denial_reason, or audit_event_id is additive-minor and bumps traceability_link_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

traceability_link_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the traceability-link vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / queue-review rollups / admin-reconciliation consoles. Raw provider URLs, raw branch / commit URLs, raw review / pull-request URLs, raw author identity strings, raw absolute paths, and raw notification payloads never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary safe for support / audit / queue-review / admin-reconciliation surfaces; never carries the raw payload.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short human-readable sentence safe to show in preview, queue-review, and export review surfaces. Never carries the raw payload.

trust_posture.description: ADR-0001 workspace-trust state the traceability link was admitted under.

redaction_class.description: Declared redaction class re-exported from ADR-0010 / ADR-0007. Raw payloads never cross this boundary regardless of class.

relation_type_class.description: Frozen relation-type class. Names the typed kind of artifact the source work item is linked to. Stable across provider outages and offline work; surfaces MUST NOT invent a parallel relation-type vocabulary. work_item_to_other_work_item covers cross-tracker / blocking / dependency / parent / child relationships; the dependency direction is captured through directionality_class.

target_artifact_class.description: Frozen target-artifact class the link resolves to. Pairs with relation_type_class so a downstream surface always knows which schema to load when chasing an artifact_record_id_ref. 'other' is repair-only.

authority_marker_class.description: Frozen authority-marker class. provider_authoritative_link_validated means the provider validated the link (callback envelope or account-mapping binding); local_authoritative_link_no_provider_overlay means the link was authored locally and the provider has no overlay (e.g. a local-draft work item linked to a local branch); provider_overlay_with_local_overlay_synced means both sides agree on the link; cached_read_only_shadow_link means the link is read-only (e.g. behind a policy-blocked write scope); imported_handoff_evidence_only_link means the link was reconstructed from imported evidence with no live provider path; link_pending_provider_validation means the link is proposed and not yet validated by a callback envelope; link_pending_account_mapping_resolution means actor resolution is pending; the two link_revoked_* classes mark a link the user or policy revoked; link_provider_unreachable_local_continues means the provider is unreachable but the link continues to render locally with the freshness chip degraded.

link_origin_class.description: Frozen link-origin class. Names where the link came from. provider_callback_envelope_minted_link and account_mapping_binding_minted_link are the two provider-validated lanes; local_user_minted_link is a link the user authored locally; the four imported_from_* lanes mark imported-evidence links; the three derived_from_* lanes mark links derived from a linked review workspace / change object / patch stack rather than authored directly; policy_admin_minted_link marks a link policy / admin pinned; ai_proposed_link_pending_user_confirmation marks an AI-proposed link awaiting user confirmation.

link_freshness_class.description: Frozen link-freshness posture. Composes with the work-item detail freshness vocabulary; the link's freshness MAY be stricter than the parent detail row's (e.g. a link that resolved through a callback envelope independently of the row import). local_only_no_provider_path is admissible only on local_authoritative_link_no_provider_overlay authority.

link_lifecycle_state_class.description: Frozen lifecycle state for the link. proposed = not yet validated; active = validated and current; superseded = replaced by a newer traceability_link_record (cite through superseded_by_traceability_link_record_id_ref); revoked_by_user / revoked_by_policy = revoked with typed reason; archived_after_close = the source work item is closed and the link is preserved for audit only.

directionality_class.description: Frozen directionality class. outbound_from_work_item = the work item references the artifact; inbound_to_work_item = the artifact references the work item (e.g. a branch with the work-item id in its name); bidirectional_pair = both sides reference each other.

blocking_relationship_class.description: Frozen blocking / dependency / parent / duplicate relationship class for work_item_to_other_work_item links. no_blocking_relationship is the default for non-blocking links.

next_safe_action_class.description: Next-safe-action hint re-exported (and extended) from the publish-later contract's next_safe_action_class. Surfaces MUST render this and MUST NOT invent surface-local actions outside this set.

artifact_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound artifact record. Resolves through the schema named in artifact_class (e.g. schemas/vcs/review_workspace.schema.json for review_workspace_record).

artifact_label.description: Reviewable label for the artifact. Never the raw branch / commit URL or raw review URL; the label is the user-visible projection only.

artifact_origin_schema_ref.description: Opaque ref to the upstream schema that owns artifact_class (e.g. schemas/vcs/review_workspace.schema.json). Empty when the artifact_class is 'other' or audit_event_stream.

target_artifact_descriptor.description: Typed descriptor for the target artifact the link resolves to. Pairs with relation_type_class through an allOf gate so a downstream surface never has to guess which schema owns the artifact.

origin_disclosure.description: Canonical Aureline origin the traceability link was minted under.

policy_context.description: Policy context the traceability link was admitted under.

denial_reason.description: Closed denial-reason vocabulary. A surface that admits a link that violates one of the gates emits a traceability_link_audit_event_record citing the matching reason. Silent downgrade is forbidden.

audit_event_id.description: Closed audit-event vocabulary for the traceability-link surface. The provider-side handoff stream remains the ADR-0010 provider_handoff stream; this stream is the local-only traceability lifecycle stream.

source_work_item_detail_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound work_item_detail_record from schemas/work_items/work_item_detail.schema.json. Required; every link MUST cite a source work item.

linked_provider_object_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound provider_object_record from schemas/work_items/provider_object.schema.json the link was minted against. Empty when the source work item has no provider-object projection (local-draft authority) or when the link was authored against the work_item_detail header directly.

blocking_relationship_class.description: Blocking / dependency / parent / duplicate relationship class. Required only when relation_type_class is work_item_to_other_work_item; forbidden otherwise.

linked_provider_callback_envelope_record.description: Opaque ref to the provider_callback_envelope_record that validated the link. Required for provider_authoritative_link_validated authority when link_origin_class is provider_callback_envelope_minted_link. Empty otherwise.

linked_account_mapping_binding_record_id.description: Opaque ref to the account_mapping_binding_record bound to the link. Required for link_pending_account_mapping_resolution authority and for provider_authoritative_link_validated authority when link_origin_class is account_mapping_binding_minted_link.

linked_browser_handoff_packet_ref.description: Opaque ref to a browser_handoff_packet_record offering an open-in-provider escape hatch on the link. Empty when no browser handoff is offered.

linked_offline_handoff_packet_record_id_.description: Opaque ref to the bound offline_handoff_packet_record. Required when link_origin_class is imported_from_offline_handoff_packet_link.

linked_object_handoff_packet_record_id_r.description: Opaque ref to the bound object_handoff_packet_record. Required when link_origin_class is imported_from_object_handoff_packet_link.

linked_support_bundle_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound support_bundle. Required when link_origin_class is imported_from_support_export_link.

linked_incident_workspace_packet_record_.description: Opaque ref to the bound incident_workspace_packet. Required when link_origin_class is imported_from_incident_workspace_link.

minted_at.description: Monotonic timestamp the link was first authored / observed.

freshness_observed_at.description: Monotonic timestamp of the most recent freshness observation against the link.

revoked_at.description: Monotonic timestamp the link was revoked. Required when link_lifecycle_state_class is revoked_by_user or revoked_by_policy.

revocation_reason_summary.description: Reviewable summary of why the link was revoked. Required when link_lifecycle_state_class is revoked_by_user or revoked_by_policy.

superseded_by_traceability_link_record_i.description: Opaque ref to the traceability_link_record that supersedes this one. Required when link_lifecycle_state_class is superseded.

supersedes_traceability_link_record_id_r.description: Opaque ref to a prior traceability_link_record this one supersedes. Empty when this is a fresh link.

allOf.description: work_item_to_branch_or_worktree relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to branch_row or worktree_row.
work_item_to_review_workspace relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to review_workspace_record.
work_item_to_review_pack_evaluation relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to review_pack_record or review_evaluation_result_record.
work_item_to_review_anchor_comment relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to review_anchor_record.
work_item_to_change_object relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to change_object_record.
work_item_to_patch_stack relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to patch_stack_record.

work_item_to_validation_evidence relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to one of the validation-evidence carriers (review_evaluation_result_record, qa_run_record, check_run_imported_snapshot_record, evidence_packet_record).
work_item_to_qa_run relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to qa_run_record.
work_item_to_check_run_imported_snapshot relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to check_run_imported_snapshot_record.
work_item_to_evidence_packet relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to evidence_packet_record.
work_item_to_incident_workspace_packet relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to incident_workspace_packet_record.
work_item_to_security_incident_packet relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to security_incident_packet_record.
work_item_to_support_bundle relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to support_bundle_record.
work_item_to_object_handoff_packet relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to object_handoff_packet_record.
work_item_to_offline_handoff_packet relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to offline_handoff_packet_record.
work_item_to_provider_consequence_preview relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to provider_consequence_preview_record.
work_item_to_publish_later_queue_item relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to publish_later_queue_item_record.
work_item_to_browser_handoff_packet relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to browser_handoff_packet_record.
work_item_to_provider_callback_envelope relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to provider_callback_envelope_record.
work_item_to_status_transition_packet relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to status_transition_packet_record.
work_item_to_release_artifact relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to release_artifact_record.
work_item_to_audit_event_stream relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to audit_event_stream.
work_item_to_other_work_item relation MUST resolve target_artifact_class to work_item_detail_record and MUST cite a blocking_relationship_class.
blocking_relationship_class is admissible only on work_item_to_other_work_item relation.
imported_handoff_evidence_only_link authority MUST resolve link_origin_class to one of the imported_from_* lanes and link_freshness_class to imported_snapshot_no_refresh_path.

provider_authoritative_link_validated authority MUST resolve link_origin_class to provider_callback_envelope_minted_link or account_mapping_binding_minted_link and link_freshness_class to live_authoritative_fresh or warm_within_grace.
link_pending_provider_validation authority MUST resolve link_lifecycle_state_class to proposed.
link_pending_account_mapping_resolution authority MUST cite a non-empty linked_account_mapping_binding_record_id_ref.
link_revoked_by_user authority MUST resolve link_lifecycle_state_class to revoked_by_user and cite revoked_at and revocation_reason_summary.
link_revoked_by_policy authority MUST resolve link_lifecycle_state_class to revoked_by_policy and cite revoked_at and revocation_reason_summary.
superseded lifecycle MUST cite a non-empty superseded_by_traceability_link_record_id_ref.
imported_from_offline_handoff_packet_link origin MUST cite a non-empty linked_offline_handoff_packet_record_id_ref.
imported_from_object_handoff_packet_link origin MUST cite a non-empty linked_object_handoff_packet_record_id_ref.
imported_from_support_export_link origin MUST cite a non-empty linked_support_bundle_record_id_ref.
imported_from_incident_workspace_link origin MUST cite a non-empty linked_incident_workspace_packet_record_id_ref.
local_only_no_provider_path freshness is admissible only on local_authoritative_link_no_provider_overlay authority.
archived_after_close lifecycle MUST resolve next_safe_action_class to no_action_archived_after_close.

traceability_link_record.description: Frozen traceability-link record. Composes with the work-item detail header through source_work_item_detail_record_id_ref; with the provider-object projection through linked_provider_object_record_id_ref; with the provider-mode contract through linked_provider_callback_envelope_record_id_ref / linked_account_mapping_binding_record_id_ref / linked_browser_handoff_packet_ref; and with the imported-evidence path through linked_offline_handoff_packet_record_id_ref / linked_object_handoff_packet_record_id_ref / linked_support_bundle_record_id_ref / linked_incident_workspace_packet_record_id_ref. The eventual work-items crate's Rust types are the source of truth; this is the cross-tool boundary.

allOf.description: traceability_link_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a denial reason.

traceability_link_audit_event_record.description: Audit-event row for the traceability-link surface. Denial events MUST cite a typed reason from the closed denial vocabulary; lifecycle events (authored, authority marker changed, freshness changed, lifecycle state changed, revoked, superseded, archived, callback observed) carry no denial reason.
